creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
Created attachment 253139
Patch to update SDCC port to 4.4.0

(In reply to Daniel O'Connor from comment #13)
OK, I added 'CONFIGURE_ENV+= CPPFLAGS="-I${PREFIX}/include"' to fix that.

make package still complains about:
[midget 14:42] /usr/ports/lang/sdcc >sudo make package
===>  Building packages for sdcc-4.4.0
===>   Building sdcc-4.4.0
pkg-static: duplicate file listing: /usr/local/share/doc/sdcc/INSTALL.txt, ignoring
pkg-static: duplicate file listing: /usr/local/share/doc/sdcc/README.txt, ignoring
pkg-static: duplicate file listing: /usr/local/share/doc/sdcc/ucsim/mulcons.html, ignoring
pkg-static: duplicate file listing: /usr/local/share/doc/sdcc/ucsim/sif_work.svg, ignoring
etc..

However I don't know how to fix that - there is only one entry for those files in pkg-plist.
